name: TSCG Tool-Schema Compressor
description: Deterministic tool-schema compression for OpenClaw agents. Recovers small-model tool accuracy from 0% to 90% via format translation. Reduces token overhead by 56-72% on frontier models.

logCompression.description: Log per-request compression stats to console + tscg-stats.jsonl

minTools.description: Skip compression below this tool count (overhead not worth it)
